# JXLatte

This project vendors JXLatte, a pure Java JPEG XL decoder, for static avatar
image decoding.

- Upstream: https://github.com/Traneptora/jxlatte
- Vendored commit: `96501e9d8116c43d5982f8ab7b90c26b8051a8c9`
- License: MIT, see `LICENSE` in this directory
- Upstream limitation: animated JPEG XL images are not supported
